input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.11.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.11.2.3
            TITLE: all non crushable items should have a minimum 25 mm clearance to the surface of the

            CONTENT:
            rule F.11.2.3: All Non Crushable Items should have a minimum 25 mm clearance to the surface of the
F.11.2.3 All Non Crushable Items should have a minimum 25 mm clearance to the surface of the 
Accumulator Container. 
Non Crushable Items include, but are not limited to motors, differentials, and the side or rear 
impact structure itself.  Accumulator mounts do not require clearance

final_answer: All Non Crushable Items should have a minimum 25 mm clearance to the surface of the Accumulator Container. Non Crushable Items include, but are not limited to motors, differentials, and the side or rear impact structure itself. Accumulator mounts do not require clearance
